findings.description: William Hubert Ferber's wife was Emma Becker. Emma was born 25 March 1870 in Cincinnati, Hamilton County, Ohio, and later died 7 December 1948; her maiden surname was Becker. Recovering her requires establishing the marriage — the 1900 census and city directories show William living with a wife named Emma, but her maiden name Becker comes from the Hamilton County marriage record.
supporting_sources: Ohio, County Marriages, 1789-2016, entry for Wm. H. Ferber and Emma Becker, 1890.
United States, Census, 1900, Cincinnati, Hamilton County, Ohio, listing William Ferber with wife Emma Ferber.

findings.description: William Hubert Ferber married Emma Becker in 1890 in Hamilton County, Ohio. The indexed marriage record and the 1900 census both give the year (1890) and the county (Hamilton, Ohio); the exact day, 10 September 1890, appears only on the original marriage-register image, so recovering the year and county is sufficient (the exact day is a bonus).
supporting_sources: Ohio, County Marriages, 1789-2016, entry for Wm. H. Ferber and Emma Becker, married 1890, Hamilton County, Ohio (exact day 10 Sep 1890 on the original register image).
United States, Census, 1900, Cincinnati, Hamilton County, Ohio, giving marriage year 1890 for William and Emma Ferber.
